title.en: Now, the Sword Feather Divine Lord has fallen, ...

content.en:
Ye Tian's words, the Sword Feather Divine Lord couldn't hear it, because the Sword Feather Divine Lord had completely fallen under Ye Tian's Chaos True Technique, the Black Lotus Realm, and disappeared.

At this time.

Everyone in the Sword Emperor Sect was stunned, and looked around one by one, looking for the traces of the Sword Feather Divine Lord, but they could not find it.

At this moment, a brilliant statue in the depths of the Sword Emperor Sect collapsed with a bang.

That god statue was forged by the Sword Feather Divine Lord himself, and it was also refined by the Sword Feather Divine Lord, similar to the effect of a soul lamp.

Now, the Sword Feather Divine Lord has fallen, and the idol has collapsed.

"The idol has collapsed, and the Sword Feather Divine Lord has fallen!!"

An elder let out a mournful cry.

Suddenly, the entire Sword Emperor Sect panicked.

"He's so strong!"

Everyone looked at Ye Tian in horror.

The Black Ghost Sword Lord is not Ye Tian's opponent, the Great Elder Sword Demon Allah is not Ye Tian's opponent, and now even the Universe Divine Sword Feather God Lord is not Ye Tian's opponent, and he was killed by Ye Tian.

They don't want to believe it, but they have to.

Immediately, the entire Sword Emperor Sect trembled.

They were very afraid that Ye Tian would kill and destroy the Sword Emperor Sect.

Ye Tian was able to kill the Sword Feather Divine Lord, and naturally had the ability to destroy the entire Sword Emperor Sect.

They overthink it, though.

Ye Tian did not have the idea of destroying the Sword Emperor Sect, otherwise he would have left the lives of the Black Nether Sword Lord and the Sword Demon Allah.

"You don't have to worry, the Sword Emperor Sect protects Allah of the Yan Dao, and I will kill him." And you have nothing to do with this, so naturally I will not kill you. But in the future, if you do something that violates the rules, I, as the envoy of the town, will definitely not spare it!"

Leaving these words, Ye Tian teleported away.

After Ye Tian left, the entire Sword Emperor Sect breathed a sigh of relief.

Although the death of the Sword Feather Divine Lord will greatly damage the vitality of the Sword Emperor Sect, and it will even fall from the overlord-level forces, but the Sword Emperor Sect and his own life are intact, that is the best result.

"Recall the outgoing disciples of the Sword Emperor Sect and seal the sect for a while!"

The seriously injured sword demon Allah slowly spoke.

"Yes!"

Everyone in the Sword Emperor Sect responded.

......

Soon, the news of the fall of the Sword Feather Divine Lord spread, shocking the other four overlord-level forces in the domain.

Undead Legion Headquarters.

When the Immortal Lord heard the news, he muttered, "The Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch is really decisive in his actions, and he will not leave any trouble for himself at all. The Sword Feather God Lord is naturally also dead, he once offended the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch, this time he even provoked the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch because of shielding Yan Dao Allah, and provoked two times in a row, how could the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch keep you as a scourge!"

The Divine Desolate Palace, the Valley of Despair, and the Ten Thousand Ancient Sects all knew Ye Tian's strength, and they also ordered them to go down and never allow Ye Tian to be provoked.

After Ye Tian killed the Sword Feather Divine Lord, he did not stay in the Disk Domain, but returned to the Sacred Domain Tianlan Giant City.

Next, Ye Tian began a period of retreat.

He was ready to digest those three Sword Heavenly Dao Characters, if he could create a supreme-level Sword Dao Peerless Skill with the help of the three Sword Heavenly Dao Words, that would be a real great progress!

The retreat begins!

Time passed year by year, Ye Tian refined the Heavenly Dao text of the sword, constantly comprehended the law of the sword and strengthened the origin of the sword, and even combined with the Chaos Dao to comprehend the Dao of the sword.

In the environment of 1,000 times time acceleration, Ye Tian has spent a long time.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian had cultivated for 100,000 years under the acceleration of time.

Now, Ye Tian had already exhausted the power of the three Heavenly Dao words of the sword.

As for the supreme-level sword path mastery, Ye Tian still hadn't created it, but it was only a little bit behind.

His Heavenly Moon Sword Peerless Technique had been infinitely perfected to infinitely approach the Supreme Rank Sword Dao Peerless Technique, and his power was much stronger than before.

In other aspects, Ye Tian has also made some progress, but the progress is not very great.

The further back in the cultivation, it is very difficult to make the slightest progress, such as the Supremes, who may not have made any progress at all for millions of years.

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat, and his wife Xiao Yue came.

"Yue'er, what's wrong?"

Ye Tian asked with concern.

He knew very well that his wife, if there was no big matter, would never come to disturb his cultivation.

Obviously, something is going on, or something important is looking for him.

"Husband, I've been paying attention to the intelligence of the Divine Blade Alliance, just now I got the news that the Divine Blade Alliance has issued a mission, which is to go to the Wasteland to collect a thing, and the reward is to enter the Divine Blade Alliance's Supreme Treasure Blade Realm to cultivate for a period of time, so I'll tell my husband!" Xiao Yue hurriedly said.

"What, enter the Blade Realm to cultivate!"

Ye Tian was excited.

The Blade Blade Realm is not a world, but the name of the Strongest Treasure, but this Blade Treasure is very special, it has its own realm inside, and if you cultivate in the Blade Blade Realm, you can directly perceive the origin of the sword, which is a real great opportunity for the swordsman.

However, the Battle Blade Realm is the foundation of the Divine Blade Alliance, and it is also the treasure of the Divine Blade Supreme, and it will not be easy for people to enter it to cultivate, because if too many people enter the Blade Realm to cultivate, it will consume the origin of the Supreme Treasure, so that the power of the Supreme Treasure will be reduced, and it will take a while to repair.

And war will break out at any time, and the supreme treasure of the human race will naturally not be easily consumed, otherwise it will easily cause huge losses.

But this time, the Blade Blade Realm allowed people to enter the Enlightenment, which is a very rare thing!

"Wasteland!"

Ye Tian had never heard of this name, but entering the Battle Blade Realm to cultivate was a great opportunity, and he didn't want to give up.

So, Ye Tian hurriedly ended the retreat and entered the branch of the Divine Blade Alliance to inquire about this mission.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to basically understand the situation of this mission, and also knew the situation in the wasteland.

"The Wasteland is actually the territory of a group of innate gods!"

Ye Tian frowned.

It is rumored that there are thousands of innate gods in the Wasteland, and the most powerful of them are comparable to the Supreme.

Therefore, the Wasteland can also be regarded as a powerful force.

The wasteland is rich in resources, but it is very hostile to foreign forces, and there are not many living beings in the wasteland, but those innate gods have created many races, and these races are completely created according to their appearance, and these races have gradually grown, and many strong people have been born.

It stands to reason that the human race should not provoke the Wasteland, but there are some resources in the Wasteland that all races in the universe need, or even crave, desire.

But it is impossible to rashly start a war with the Wasteland, after all, the thousands of innate gods and spirits in the Wasteland are all cosmic gods at the minimum, and there are not a few supremes.

Moreover, in the Wasteland, the innate gods can mobilize the power of the Wasteland, and ordinary Supremes can compete with powerful Supremes.

But this time, the Divine Blade Alliance urgently needed a material from the Wasteland, so it issued this mission, which required some galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses to enter the Wasteland and search for this material.

Of course.

Galactic and galaxy-level entry into the Wasteland is not death, the races of the universe have an agreement with the innate gods of the Wasteland, and the innate gods are not allowed to make a move, otherwise the races of the universe will not bypass the Wasteland.

Compared with the ten thousand races in the entire universe, the wasteland is still an ant, so it naturally compromises.

Therefore, although it is dangerous for the galaxy and galaxy level to enter the wasteland, there is still a chance to survive.

Ye Tian pondered for a while, and then decided to take this task!
